title: Sales Manager Vacancy at CREDAI - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at CREDAI - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
CREDAI, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Sales Manager for our Jaipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About CREDAI:
CREDAI is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CREDAI!
